BLW Canada

FoundationSchool

A 6-week journey to help you really understand who you are in Christ and how to live the victorious life God called you to.

✅ Registration is now open!
Why Join
Building a Rock Solid Foundation in Christ

It's a journey to discover your purpose, strengthen your walk with God, and build a Rock Solid foundation in your faith. You'll leave equipped, confident, and ready to make an impact wherever you go!

About

The Foundation School is a 6-week journey (including a final quiz) that helps you really understand who you are in Christ and how to live the victorious life God called you to. You'll explore your new identity, the Holy Spirit, and how to live out your faith in a fun and practical way. It's the perfect next step to grow spiritually, get rooted in God's Word, and start serving with confidence!

Course Overview
01

New Creation

Discover who the new man in Christ is and understand the life and nature that is from God.

02

The Holy Spirit

Develop an understanding on the absolute, active and essential ministry of the Holy Spirit to you.

03

Christian Doctrines

Understand the core truths of God's Word to serve as a guiding principle for your Christian walk.

04

Evangelism & Cell Ministry

Find out how to share your faith confidently and make real impact through your cell group.

05

Christian Character

Build the right habits, attitude, and lifestyle that reflect the nature of Christ in you.

06

Local Assembly & Loveworld

This class teaches the importance of the church and how it functions within the larger Loveworld nation.

07

Technology for Growth

This class explains how to use digital tools, platforms, and media to strengthen your spiritual life.

The Experience

🎓 Fun & Exciting

Each week's online session is filled with interactive lessons, real-life discussions, and fun activities that make God's Word come alive! Through our Moodle dashboard, you'll get access to weekly quizzes, eBooks, sermon excerpts, and more.

🎉 Graduation & Baptism

We end with a special graduation and baptism ceremony to celebrate your commitment and growth in the Word. You'll leave equipped, confident, and ready to make an impact wherever you go!
